3291770.name: The Search
3291770.description: The Search is a thrilling third-person shooter adventure set in a gritty, post-apocalyptic world overrun by AI robots and monstrous creatures. Guided by the whispers of ancestral voices, you step into the role of a resilient survivor determined to fight back and restore hope to humanity. Armed with diverse weapons and abilities, you'll traverse expansive, dangerous environments, face relentless enemies, and uncover secrets of the world’s downfall. With immersive gameplay and a compelling narrative, The Search challenges you to push your limits and embark on a journey of survival, discovery, and redemption. Will you rise against the odds and reclaim the future?
3291770.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
